channel.title: Moth on Advanced Integration Laboratory
channel.description: Recent content in Moth on Advanced Integration Laboratory

item.title: Qi-Sheng Huang Earns Honourable Mention at CSME Conference
item.description: At this year’s CSME Conference, Qi-Sheng Huang received an Honourable Mention (佳作) in the student paper competition for research supervised by Dr Lan. The study applied the silkmoth’s tracking behaviour to robotic guidance and control, achieving improved efficiency and accuracy through a nature-inspired approach.

item.title: Dr Lan's Team Unveils 3 Cutting-Edge Research at AMAM Conference
item.description: Dr Lan and his team presented research on aerodynamics and odour tracking at the 11th International Symposium on Adaptive Motion of Animals and Machines (AMAM) in Kobe. Their work contributed new insights into the interaction between animal locomotion and engineering technology.
